per_turn_leaks.student_message: In cases like yours, associated symptoms are critical. Are you experiencing any sweating, nausea, or other symptoms during episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I have been having night sweats for about 4 nights now. It's been really uncomfortable and has added to my overall fatigue and malaise.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I need you to be completely honest with me. Does the pain or discomfort spread to any other part of your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The sharp right-sided chest pain is still present, it's worse when I take deep breaths or cough. It doesn't seem to radiate anywhere else.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Standard protocol requires me to ask — have you had any changes in appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My appetite has actually decreased over the past 5 days.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Family history is essential for your assessment. Has anyone in your immediate family had serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mother has asthma, which has been pretty well-managed over the years.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I need specifics. What exactly happened to your family members? What conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer a few years ago. That's about all I know about serious medical conditions in my family.
